name: friction tracker omits user identifier fields when activity opt-in is unset to honor SPACE privacy posture
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/friction space && printf 'dimensions:
  activity: {opt_in: true, enabled: false}
share: never
' > space/config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/friction-tracker.sh" --event hook-block --hook x --decision deny --user me --at 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z --config space/config.yaml 2>err.txt && ! grep -q 'user=me' .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl && grep -q 'event=hook-block' .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
